# age public keys authorized to decrypt .age files in this directory.
# One recipient per line. Comments allowed.
#
# After adding or removing a line, run `scripts/secrets.sh rekey` to
# re-encrypt every file against the updated list.
#
# Generate a new identity with:
#   age-keygen -o ~/.config/age/iroh-ble-chat.txt
# then copy the `# public key: ageXXXX` line from the top of that file
# and paste (without the `# public key: ` prefix) below.
age1q3j6g8twlrsvuv837qul87czchfwuz985ypdvyjvc0tnt5kwaajqdl3k4u
